title: RHCSA 10 Mock Exam E
description: Storage and boot focus: labeled filesystem persistence, kernel arguments, LVM, NFS, documentation, package administration, users, scheduling, and logging.

tasks: On client, set hostname to cliente.exam10.lab and map servere.exam10.lab to 192.168.122.3.
Configure System eth1 with IPv4 address 192.168.122.64/24, gateway 192.168.122.1, and DNS 192.168.122.3.
On client and server, create enabled BaseOS and AppStream repository definitions with BaseOS at http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and AppStream at http://server/repo/AppStream/; disable GPG checks.
On client, create a labeled XFS filesystem on /dev/sdc1 and mount it persistently at /mnt/exame-label.
On client, add audit_backlog_limit=8192 to all installed kernel entries.
Create group teame10, create user usere10, set password cinder9, and add the user to teame10.
On server, create group servere10 and user srve10 with password cinder9, then add the user to servere10.
On server, allow members of servere10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
Create /usr/local/bin/e-who that prints the primary group for the supplied user argument.
Write users whose shell ends with sh to /root/e-shell-users.txt.
Create gzip archive /root/e-etc.tar.gz containing /etc/hosts and /etc/fstab.
Create /root/e-original, hard link /root/e-hard, and symlink /root/e-soft.
On server, create and enable serveretimer.timer so it appends SERVER-E to /var/log/serveretimer.log every 10 minutes.
Create VG vge10 and LV datae mounted at /mnt/datae10.
On server, publish /var/www/html/server-e.html containing RHCSA10-E and serve httpd on TCP port 8204.
On server, create /srv/servere10 owned by root:servere10 with mode 2770.
Activate the throughput-performance tuned profile.
On server, route local5 log messages to /var/log/server-e-local5.log and write a test message.
On server, export /exports/exam-e to the 192.168.122.0/24 network. On client, mount server:/exports/exam-e persistently at /mnt/eprojects.
On client, create /root/exam-e-report.txt containing REPORT-E and copy it to server:/root/exam-e-report.txt.
Install lsof and ensure tcpdump is removed.
On server, enable persistent systemd journal storage.
On client, add a hosts entry for servere.exam10.lab and save the output of http://servere.exam10.lab:8204/server-e.html to /root/server-e-web-check.txt.
hints: Make changes persistent unless a question says otherwise.
Use local repositories and local documentation; do not depend on internet access.
Flatpak and systemd timer tasks belong to the RHCSA 10 track.
checks: hostnamectl --static | grep -qx cliente.exam10.lab && grep -Eq '^192\.168\.122\.3[[:space:]]+servere\.exam10\.lab$' /etc/hosts

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.64/24' && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.1' && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.3' && nmcli -g ipv4.method connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx manual

awk 'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; awk '"'"'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo'

findmnt -no TARGET /mnt/exame-label | grep -qx /mnt/exame-label && blkid -s LABEL -o value /dev/sdc1 | grep -qx EXAME10 && awk '$1 == "LABEL=EXAME10" && $2 == "/mnt/exame-label" && $3 == "xfs" {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
grubby --info=ALL | awk -F= '$1 == "args" {count++; if ($0 !~ /(^|[[:space:]"])audit_backlog_limit=8192([[:space:]"]|$)/) missing=1} END {exit !(count > 0 && missing == 0)}'
getent group teame10 >/dev/null && id -nG usere10 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx teame10
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group servere10 >/dev/null && id -nG srve10 | tr '"'"' '"'"' '"'"'\n'"'"' | grep -qx servere10'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^%servere10[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$'"'"' /etc/sudoers.d/servere10-systemctl && visudo -cf /etc/sudoers.d/servere10-systemctl >/dev/null'
test -x /usr/local/bin/e-who && /usr/local/bin/e-who root | grep -qx root
test -s /root/e-shell-users.txt && grep -q '^root$' /root/e-shell-users.txt
test -f /root/e-etc.tar.gz && tar -tzf /root/e-etc.tar.gz | grep -Eq 'etc/(hosts|fstab)'
test "$(stat -c %i /root/e-original)" = "$(stat -c %i /root/e-hard)" && test -L /root/e-soft

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled serveretimer.timer | grep -qx enabled && grep -Eq '"'"'^OnCalendar=\*:0/10$'"'"' /etc/systemd/system/serveretimer.timer && grep -Fxq '"'"'echo SERVER-E >> /var/log/serveretimer.log'"'"' /usr/local/sbin/serveretimer.sh'

lv_path=/dev/vge10/datae; mapper_path=/dev/mapper/vge10-datae; mountpoint=/mnt/datae10; lv_uuid="$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$lv_path")"; lvs "$lv_path" >/dev/null 2>&1 && findmnt -no TARGET "$mountpoint" | grep -qx "$mountpoint" && awk -v dev="$lv_path" -v mapper="$mapper_path" -v uuid="$lv_uuid" -v target="$mountpoint" '$1 !~ /^#/ && $2 == target && $3 == "xfs" && ($1 == dev || $1 == mapper || $1 == "UUID=" uuid || $1 == "/dev/disk/by-uuid/" uuid) {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq RHCSA10-E /var/www/html/server-e.html && grep -Eq '"'"'^Listen[[:space:]]+8204$'"'"' /etc/httpd/conf.d/exam-e-port.conf && semanage port -l | awk '"'"'$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8204([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8204/tcp && firewall-cmd --query-port=8204/tcp && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group servere10 >/dev/null && stat -c '"'"'%U:%G:%a'"'"' /srv/servere10 | grep -qx root:servere10:2770'
tuned-adm active | grep -q throughput-performance

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^local5\.\*[[:space:]]+/var/log/server-e-local5\.log$'"'"' /etc/rsyslog.d/server-e-local5.conf && systemctl is-active rsyslog | grep -qx active && grep -Fq '"'"'server-e-local5'"'"' /var/log/server-e-local5.log'

findmnt -no SOURCE,TARGET /mnt/eprojects | grep -qx 'server:/exports/exam-e /mnt/eprojects' && grep -Eq '^server:/exports/exam-e[[:space:]]+/mnt/eprojects[[:space:]]+nfs([[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq "^/exports/exam-e[[:space:]]+192\\.168\\.122\\.0/24" /etc/exports.d/exam-e-integrated.exports && systemctl is-active nfs-server | grep -qx active'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq REPORT-E /root/exam-e-report.txt'
rpm -q lsof >/dev/null && ! rpm -q tcpdump >/dev/null 2>&1

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; files=""; test -d /var/log/journal && systemctl is-active systemd-journald | grep -qx active && files=$(find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '"'"'/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf'"'"' \) -type f 2>/dev/null); test -n "$files" && awk '"'"'FNR == 1 {in_journal=0} /^[[:space:]]*\[Journal\][[:space:]]*($|#)/ {in_journal=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\[/ {in_journal=0} in_journal && /^[[:space:]]*Storage[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*persistent[[:space:]]*($|#)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' $files'
grep -Fxq RHCSA10-E /root/server-e-web-check.txt
solution_outline: Work through each question independently and verify before moving on.

add audit_backlog_limit=8192 to all installed kernel entries
Create group teame10, create user usere10, set password cinder9, and add
create group servere10 and user srve10 with password cinder9, then add t
allow members of servere10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a
Create /usr/local/bin/e-who that prints the primary group for the suppli
Write users whose shell ends with sh to /root/e-shell-users.txt
Create gzip archive /root/e-etc.tar.gz containing /etc/hosts and /etc/fs
Create /root/e-original, hard link /root/e-hard, and symlink /root/e-sof
create and enable serveretimer.timer so it appends SERVER-E to /var/log/
Create VG vge10 and LV datae mounted at /mnt/datae10
publish /var/www/html/server-e.html containing RHCSA10-E and serve httpd
create /srv/servere10 owned by root:servere10 with mode 2770
Activate the throughput-performance tuned profile
route local5 log messages to /var/log/server-e-local5.log and write a te
export /exports/exam-e to the 192.168.122.0/24 network. On client, mount
create /root/exam-e-report.txt containing REPORT-E and copy it to server
Install lsof and ensure tcpdump is removed

add a hosts entry for servere.exam10.lab and save the output of http://s
solution_commands: nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.64/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF
parted -s /dev/sdc -- mklabel gpt mkpart primary xfs 1MiB 513MiB

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serveretimer.service <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Server E timer job

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/serveretimer.sh
EOF

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serveretimer.timer <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Run server E timer job

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*:0/10
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
EOF
semanage port -a -t http_port_t -p tcp 8204 2>/dev/null || semanage port -m -t http_port_t -p tcp 8204

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF
